description: Add control points to edges. Control points are added on all edges in the current building blocks set if < range > is not supplied.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Add control points to edges. Control points are added on all edges in the current building blocks set if <range> is not supplied.

keywords.name: adummy
keywords.description: Add exactly i control points per each edge (i must be a positive integer no greater than 20). Added control points will be evenly spaced.

keywords.name: use-size
keywords.description: Add a number of control points equal to the number of zones on each edge (see building-blocks edge size).

keywords.name: adummy

keywords.name: use-size
keywords.description: Add a number of control points equal to the number of zones on each edge (see building-blocks edge size ).
